title: Macpack
description: An optimization modpack for macOS users
body:
# What's this?
This is a meticulously-chosen optimization modpack for Mac users. It is still highly experimental and a work in progress.

# Notes
- I will keep this modpack updated from time to time, but do not expect regular updates.
- I try to limit the amount of QoL mods that I personally use on my instance of Minecraft. This modpack is purely for optimization and actual playability on macOS. However, this does add *some* OptiFine compatibility mods.

# Included mods
- [Amecs](https://modrinth.com/mod/amecs)
- [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica)
- [Anvil Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/anvil-display)
